prompt: Improve Recall public positioning while protecting truthfulness. Always distinguish current capability from roadmap, flag public-assistant/private-Recall automation gaps, avoid saying specialists learn through model training unless training exists, and turn abstract claims into visible proof moments with source-run and replay evidence.
approvedLessonsAdditions: Recall marketing should say private Recall-connected workflow or explicit bridge unless public assistant access is actually implemented.
Evolving specialist claims should point to versioned bundles, source runs, replay evidence, and promoted lessons rather than hidden model learning.
Public proof loops need same-post observability: claim, source memory or run, replay/version evidence, and current-vs-roadmap boundary.
